title: dichanthium annulatum var. fecundum
intro: Dichanthium annulatum var. fecundum, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass native to the United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Dichanthium annulatum var. fecundum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application for skin conditions.
